title: First Rhode Island Regiment Congressional Gold Medal Act
action: Message on Senate action sent to the House.
summary: The First Rhode Island Regiment Congressional Gold Medal Act is a legislative measure that aims to award the Congressional Gold Medal to the First Rhode Island Regiment for its service during the American Revolutionary War. The act aims to honor and recognize the historical significance of this regiment's contributions to the war effort.
